title: Is it a VOWEL or CONSONANT

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to take a character $(C)$ as input and check whether the given character is a vowel or a consonant.

$NOTE:-$
Vowels are 'A', 'E', 'I', 'O', 'U'. Rest all alphabets are called consonants.
content.inputFormat: - First line will contain the character $C$.
content.outputFormat: Print "Vowel" if the given character is a vowel, otherwise print "Consonant".
